Ars-i..Bladder: It acts deeply upon the bladder and kidneys. It has been most useful in Addison's disease.
Ars-i..Chest: There is marked anxiety in the region of the heart. Catarrh of the bronchial tubes; constriction of the chest, of the heart; fatty degeneration of the heart. Enlarged and painful mammae. Heat in the chest.
Ars-i..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: palpitation from excitement, from exertion; tumultuous palpitation.
Ars-i..Chill: Chill at night in bed; chill external and internal, worse from motion. Quartian, tertian shaking-chill; periodicity marked; warm room does not ameliorate the chill.
Ars-i..Extremities: Coldness of hands, legs and feet; cramps of upper limbs, lower limbs, thighs, legs and feet; scaly eruptions, eczema and vesicles; heat of hands; heaviness of the limbs as though tired; heaviness of the feet.
Ars-i..Extremities, coldness: Coldness of hands, legs and feet
Ars-i..Extremities, coldness, hands: Coldness of hands, legs and feet; cramps of upper limbs, lower limbs, thighs, legs and feet
Ars-i..Generalities: From a study of the elements making up this agent, it may be known that it is a deep-acting constitutional remedy. Its complaints come on in the morning, afternoon, evening, night, after midnight. In hectic conditions, with many abscesses. Extreme anaemia, such as belongs to tuberculous subjects.
Ars-i..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Weakness, like a vital prostration, in the morning, when ascending, on exertion, during menses, and on walking; worse in wet weather, worse from the worm south wind.
Ars-i..Genitalia female: It has been a great comfort to the women in many complaints. It has restrained the progress of cancer of uterus in a notable manner; the burning and odor are removed and the ulceration is lessened.
Ars-i..Mind: Anger and irritability during all complaints; aversion to answering questions; extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed; confusion of mind morning and evening; delirium during the night; illusions of fancy and delusions about dead people.
Ars-i..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed
Ars-i..Mouth: In the mouth there are aphthae; the gums bleed easily, and the tongue is cracked. The tongue is coated brown or white; mouth and tongue are dry at night and during sleep, the tongue feels enlarged, inflammation of the gums.
Ars-i..Respiration: The voice is hoarse, rough and weak and finally lost; respiration is fast and asthmatic; respiration is difficult at night, on ascending, on exertion and motion, with palpitation; respiration is irregular, rattling, short, suffocative and wheezing.
Ars-i..Skin: Anaesthesia of the skin; burning skin; the skin is jaundiced; liver spots and red spots. The skin is cold to touch; dryness of the skin with inability to perspire. Many eruptions on the skin; boils, pustules, rash and scales moist eruptions, eczema, itching eruption; herpes; psoriasis.
Ars-i..Stomach: The appetite is increased, even ravenous; aversion to food; constriction of the stomach; the stomach is distended.
Ars-i..Appetite, ravenous, canine, excessive: The appetite is increased, even ravenous
Ars-i..Bladder, urination: Retention of urine; constant or frequent urging to urinate; worse during the night; urination is dribbling and involuntary, suppression of urine; the urine is albuminous, cloudy, dark, red, copious or scanty and offensive.
Ars-i..Generalities, weakness: Weakness, like a vital prostration, in the morning, when ascending, on exertion, during menses, and on walking; worse in wet weather, worse from the worm south wind.
Ars-i..Mind, restlessness: extreme anxiety, restlessness and fear; worse in a warm bed
Ars-i..Appetite: The appetite is increased, even ravenous; aversion to food
Ars-i..Appetite, ravenous: The appetite is increased, even ravenous
Ars-i..Clinical: It has been most useful in Addison's disease.
Ars-i..Heart & Circulation, heart: Paralysis of the heart, of the lungs. It is a very useful remedy in ulcerative conditions during phthisis; swollen axillary glands: tremulous heart; tumor of the axilla. Great weakness of chest and heart.
Ars-i..Genitalia female, uterus: It has restrained the progress of cancer of uterus in a notable manner; the burning and odor are removed and the ulceration is lessened. Life has been prolonged to four years in several cases.
Ars-i..Heart & Circulation: There is marked anxiety in the region of the heart. Catarrh of the bronchial tubes; constriction of the chest, of the heart; fatty degeneration of the heart.
Ars-i..Face: The face becomes cold. Bluish lips and bluish circles about the eyes brownish, earthy, or pale face; again the face is red and there are circumscribed red cheeks the face is sallow and jaundiced; yellow spots on the face; sickly look the face looks drawn and emaciated; eruptions on face and nose; acne, eczema, pimples, pustules, expression sickly and old; pain in the face.
Ars-i..Generalities, morning: Its complaints come on in the morning, afternoon, evening, night, after midnight.
Ars-i..Mind, sadness, mental depression: Sadness, even to despair; discontentment, and he is often in a state of great excitement
